name: 4K-AMZ - Just Add Magic: Mystery City
plot: In a spinoff of the successful series Just Add Magic, we follow the magic cookbook to Bay City as it moves to three new protectors: step-siblings Zoe and Leo, and their downstairs neighbor Ish. Each of the three brings a unique skill to the table, as the cookbook unlocks a centuries-old mystery that takes them on an historical adventure through the city streets in a race to find a secret recipe.
cast: Tyler Sanders, Jenna Qureshi, Jolie Hoang-Rappaport, Shane Harper, Tess Paras, Matt Dellapina, Sydney Taylor, Elliott Smith
genre: Kids / Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Animation / Comedy / Family

name: 4K-AMZ - Just Add Magic
plot: Kelly Quinn and her two BFF's, Darbie and Hannah, stumble upon her grandmother's mysterious cookbook in the attic and discover some far from ordinary recipes. When the Shut'em Up Shortcake silences Kelly's pesky little brother and the Healing Hazelnut Tart heals Darbie's ankle, the girls discover they have the power of magic. A single-camera live-action pilot based on the popular book.
cast: Olivia Sanabia, Abby Donnelly, Aubrey K. Miller, Dee Wallace, Amy Hill, Catia Ojeda, Andrew Burlinson, Ellen Karsten
director: Aubrey K. Miller, Olivia Sanabia, Abby Donnelly
